title: lepechinia graveolens
intro: Lepechinia graveolens, also known as Mexican mint, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lepechinia graveolens include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a popular remedy for colds and flu. Lepechinia graveolens can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in cooking and as a culinary herb to add flavor to various dishes.
